name: Crescent Taco Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Brown ground beef and drain excess fat.
3. Stir in seasoning mix and water; simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Separate crescent dough into 8 triangles and press into an ungreased pie pan to form a crust.
5. Sprinkle 1 cup of crushed corn chips over the bottom of the crust.
6. Spoon meat mixture over the crust and corn chips.
7. Spread sour cream evenly over the meat mixture.
8. Cover with shredded cheese.
9. Sprinkle remaining corn chips on top.
10. Bake for 20-25 minutes. Serves 4-6
